name: przetargimiejskie-pipeline
description: Scrapes municipal property auction results and builds data/<city>/*.json for the Chrome extension
comment:dependencies: playwright powers the OPTIONAL headless renderer (core/render.js) for the few JS-rendered BIPs. It is loaded lazily — the 9 server-rendered cities never touch it. CI runs `npx playwright install --with-deps chromium`. undici powers the OPTIONAL proxy egress (core/fetch.js FETCH_PROXY_URL, for hosts that firewall GH-runner/Azure IPs, e.g. bip2.finn.pl); it too is loaded lazily — with the env var unset it is never imported. Pinned ^6 to stay compatible with any Node >=18.17 (incl. self-hosted runners on older 20.x); undici 7 raises the floor to 20.18.1.
